info.title: Odds API
info.description:
The Odds API V1 provides sports and racing events, bookmaker odds, live price updates, betting opportunity
snapshots, and result lookups for production integrations.

Authenticate every request with `X-API-Key: <your_api_key>` unless an endpoint explicitly states it is public.
Use `https://api.odds-api.net/v1` as the production base URL.

Snapshot endpoints return JSON and include timestamps or resume tokens when live updates are available.
`/stream` endpoints use Server-Sent Events (`text/event-stream`) and `/ws` endpoints use WebSockets. Stream
messages use the same shape in both transports: an event name such as `delta`, `heartbeat`, or `resync`, plus a
JSON payload. Store the latest `resume` value and pass it back as `since` after reconnecting.

Odds can change quickly. Check `as_of_ts_ms`, handle empty arrays, suspended selections, rate limits, and stale
prices before displaying or acting on any betting data.

x-workflow-examples.name: positive_ev_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Find positive EV bets for a league.
steps: Use response timestamps and stake/risk controls before showing user-facing picks.

x-workflow-examples.name: arbitrage_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Find arbitrage opportunities across allowed bookmakers.
steps: Show execution-risk caveats; never present arbitrage as guaranteed after limits, voids, or delays.

x-workflow-examples.name: odds_history_request
x-workflow-examples.summary: Get line movement for a market.
steps: Pick a selection_key from an odds line.

info.x-responsible-gambling: Do not present betting outcomes as risk-free. Always mention execution risk, stale prices, bookmaker limits, voids, delays, and jurisdictional availability in user-facing products.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Redis stream ID to resume from; pass as 'since' to /stream.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Redis stream ID to resume from; pass as 'since' to /stream.

detail.description: Human-readable error detail. FastAPI may return a string or a validation-error object.

code.description: Optional stable error code when provided by the endpoint.

RateLimitResponse.description: Rate-limit response. Retry after the window or reduce polling frequency.

ApiIdentityResponse.description: Authenticated API identity and enabled product capabilities.

UsageResponse.description: Quota and usage counters for the API key. Fields can vary by plan.

bookmakers.description: Canonical bookmaker identifiers active for this country code.

BetOpportunity.description: A normalized betting opportunity. Strategy-specific fields may be present.

resume.description: JSON string mapping each requested strategy to its stream resume ID.

StreamHeartbeat.description: Heartbeat payload. A heartbeat confirms the stream is still open and carries no data.

StreamResyncEvent.description: Sent when a resume token is no longer available and the client should reload the snapshot.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Send your API key in this header on every request.
